name: Creamed Chicken and Fettuccine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepot, prepare the fettuccine according to label instructions; drain. Return the fettuccine to the saucepan and keep warm.
2. Meanwhile, cut each chicken breast in half. In a small bowl, beat the egg slightly. On waxed paper, mix 1/4 cup flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper. Dip chicken pieces into egg, then coat evenly with the flour mixture.
3. In an 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat, melt 2 tablespoons butter or margarine (1/4 stick). Cook the chicken until tender and browned, about 10 minutes. Remove to a platter and keep warm.
4. Prepare the sauce; in the drippings in the skillet over medium heat, add 2 more tablespoons butter or margarine. Add mushrooms and cook until tender. Stir in 2 tablespoons flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper; cook for 1 minute. Stir in milk and sherry; cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens. Stir in cheese until melted. Remove about 1 cup of sauce.
5. Toss fettuccine with sauce in the skillet. Arrange on a platter with chicken. Pour reserved sauce over chicken. Sprinkle fettuccine with parsley.
